rows.label: qev075202_MSG0002
rows.name:
...You're here. Sorry, I was
uncharacteristically lost in
thought and spaced out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075202_MSG0003
rows.name:
Heh... This forest is so beautiful,
it made me remember my homeland.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075202_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask for details about Zang's past.

rows.label: qev075202_SEL0021
rows.name: Take a combat stance, stating you didn't come here to chat.

rows.label: qev075202_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Well, I'll talk about it as we
go. A battle in the forest probably
won't end quickly, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075202_MSG0006
rows.name:
Nice! A response just to my liking!
Well, a battle in the forest probably
won't end quickly, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075202_MSG0007
rows.name:
I'll tell you some stories of the
past as we go. How should I say
it... I want you to know about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075202_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Then... let the match begin!
Let's see if you can catch my
form hidden in the forest![ST:wait ]
